description: Style Noteadidas catches the playful mood just right with these printed tees. Bright prints and a comfortable Fit gets the Sports-casual look back in vogue. You can pair this with cotton shorts or denims for a slick look. Product DetailsGreen T-shirt, has a round neckline, short sleeves, graphic print with branding in front and branding below the neckline at the backMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not bleach or tumble dryUse cool ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M
